findings.location: OCR table — 正規化が必要な表（正規化前）, column 5 header
findings.jp_actual: 山田太郎くんが転校すると伊藤一郎先生までいなくなる（矛盾）
findings.jp_expected: （空列 / 表注として本文に配置すべき）
findings.trace: OCR captured the callout annotation 「山田太郎くんが転校すると伊藤一郎先生までいなくなる（矛盾）」 as a 5th column header in the table instead of as a separate caption/annotation. The structured output (translated/output) dropped this table entirely, retaining only the definition text. The annotation meaning is preserved in the definition prose. No content is lost in the output file.
findings.recommended_fix: In OCR/structured stage, treat this annotation as a figure caption or aside block, not a table column. Low priority as output is clean.
